  • directive — A class enhancing python dictionaries »

Introduction¶

Please refer to Introduction of the language module for more information about the definition of directives and keywords. The directive module defines a concrete Directive class which inherits from a python dictionary and presents some utilities to find language definition files, handle keywords default values and combine directives.

Previous topic

directive — A class enhancing python dictionaries

Next topic

The Directive class — Handling users’ requests
